_comment: Block-pinned regression fixtures for the Circles test environment.
ONLY planes that are genuinely block-pinned are asserted here:
- Anvil  : real fork at --fork-block-number N (state is exact at block N)
- Pathfinder findPath / findMaxFlow : honor X-Max-Block-Number via HistoricalGraphCache
DB and RPC data-query counts are DELIBERATELY ABSENT: those planes are NOT
block-pinned. `SET circles.max_block_number` is set on the connection but no
view reads it, so counts return live state regardless of session block
blocks). Do not add count assertions until the views honor the session var.
Values captured 2026-06-01 against a hosted test environment.

balanceOf.label: source holds its own personal token

findPath.label: sink trusts source's token directly (1 hop)
